segment.source: Renders one card containing a vertical list where every item gets a check-mark icon, a bold title, and an optional one-line description. Use it for: 'what's included' lists, plan benefits, deliverables, scope-of-service bullets, package contents, or requirement lists found in offers and pricing documents. Prefer 'Feature Comparison Table' to contrast two plans row by row; use 'Numbered Feature Steps' when item order matters.
